Segmentation fault তখন ঘটে যখন প্রোগ্রাম অনুমোদিত নয় এমন মেমোরি লোকেশন অ্যাক্সেস করতে চেষ্টা করে। সাধারণত ভুল পয়েন্টার বা array-এর সীমা অতিক্রম করলে এটি হয়।

Binary search is implemented by repeatedly dividing the sorted list into two halves and comparing the target value with the middle element until the element is found or the search interval becomes empty.
To implement binary search, first ensure the array is sorted. Then compare the target value with the middle element and move to the left or right half accordingly until the element is found.
Python e linked list implement korte hole Node class create korte hoy, jekhane data ebong next pointer thake. Tarpor node gulo ke ekta arektar sathe link kore list toiri kora hoy.
Prothome ekta Node structure banate hoy jekhane data thakbe ebong next node-er reference thakbe. Tarpor node gula connect kore linked list build kora hoy.

Recursion is a programming technique where a function calls itself to solve a smaller part of the same problem. It continues until a base case is reached, which stops the recursive calls.
Recursion is a method of solving problems by breaking them into smaller subproblems of the same type. The function repeatedly calls itself until a terminating condition (base case) is satisfied.
Recursion holo ekta technique jekhane function nijeke abar call kore problem solve kore. Base case holo shei condition jekhane recursion stop hoy.
Recursion e function bar bar nijeke call kore smaller problem solve kore. Jokhon base case condition true hoy, tokhon recursion ar cholena.
Recursion হলো এমন একটি পদ্ধতি যেখানে একটি ফাংশন নিজেকেই বারবার কল করে সমস্যার ছোট অংশ সমাধান করে। Base case হলো সেই শর্ত যেখানে recursion বন্ধ হয়ে
Use BFS (Breadth First Search) when you need to find the shortest path in an unweighted graph. It explores nodes level by level.
Use DFS (Depth First Search) when you need to explore all possible paths or go deep into a graph or tree before backtracking.
Jodi shortest path ber korte hoy, tahole BFS better, karon eta level by level search kore.
Jodi deep search ba sob path explore korte hoy, tahole DFS use kora valo, karon eta ekta path dhore deep e jay.
যদি সবচেয়ে ছোট পথ (shortest path) খুঁজতে হয় তাহলে BFS ভালো, আর যদি গভীরে গিয়ে সব সম্ভাব্য পথ অনুসন্ধান করতে হয় তাহলে DFS ব্যবহার করা ভালো।
A hash map should be used when you need fast key-value lookup. It allows quick searching, insertion, and deletion compared to arrays.
Use a hash map when data is accessed using unique keys rather than indexes. It provides efficient data retrieval.
Hash map use korle data key diye quickly search kora jay, ja array er cheye onek fast.
Array te index diye data access korte hoy, kintu hash map e key-value pair thake, tai search kora easy hoy.
যখন key ব্যবহার করে দ্রুত ডাটা খুঁজে বের করতে হয়, তখন hash map ব্যবহার করা ভালো। এতে ডাটা খোঁজা ও সংরক্ষণ করা দ্রুত হয়।
If two loops run inside each other and each runs n times, the time complexity is O(n²) because the total number of operations becomes n × n.
The time complexity of a nested loop depends on the number of iterations. If both loops iterate n times, the overall complexity will be O(n²).
Jodi code e nested loop thake, tahole usually O(n²) complexity hoy. Optimization er jonno better algorithm ba data structure use kora jay.
Code er Big-O complexity loop er iteration er upor depend kore. Jodi two nested loop thake, tahole eta O(n²) hote pare.
যদি কোডে দুটি nested loop থাকে এবং প্রতিটি n বার করে চলে, তাহলে সময় জটিলতা O(n²) হয়। উন্নত algorithm ব্যবহার করলে এটি optimize করা যেতে পারে।

Interface: Use when you want to define a contract that multiple unrelated classes can implement. All methods are abstract by default. Abstract class: Use when you want to share common code among related classes and still have some abstract methods.

Polymorphism means “many forms”. It allows an object to take multiple forms, usually via method overriding or method overloading. Compile-time polymorphism: Method overloading Run-time polymorphism: Method overriding
Interface use korbo jokhon different unrelated classes same behavior implement korbe. Abstract class use korbo jokhon related classes er moddhe common code share korte hobe.
Encapsulation mane data + methods ke ekta class er under hide kora. Data private rakha hoy Access korte getter/setter method use hoy Ei process data safe r rakha help kore
Inheritance মানে একটি ক্লাস অন্য ক্লাসের properties এবং methods গ্রহণ করা। সুবিধা: কোড পুনঃব্যবহার, সহজ maintenance, এবং hierarchical design সম্ভব।
INNER JOIN: Returns only the rows where matching records exist in both tables. LEFT JOIN: Returns all rows from the left table and matching rows from the right table. If no match, NULL is returned.
Normalization is the process of organizing data to reduce redundancy and improve data integrity. Example: splitting a table into multiple related tables using keys.
INNER JOIN: duita table er match kora rows return kore. LEFT JOIN: left table er sob row show kore, match na thakle right table NULL thakbe.
Large table e query performance improve kore Example: CREATE INDEX idx_name ON students(name);
Schema design হল ডাটাবেসের structure বা blueprint তৈরি করা। টেবিল, কলাম, key ঠিক করে রাখা সুবিধা: efficient query, data consistency, maintenance সহজ হয়
Process: Independent program with its own memory space. Thread: Light-weight unit of a process, shares memory with other threads of the same process.

A deadlock occurs when two or more processes wait indefinitely for resources held by each other. Example: Process A holds Resource 1 and waits for Resource 2, while Process B holds Resource 2 and waits for Resource 1.
Process: independent, own memory thake Thread: lightweight, memory share kore same process er sathe
Paging memory fragmentation avoid kore. Physical memory ke fixed-size blocks (pages) e divide kore Logical address → Physical address mapping possible
Scheduling হল CPU কে processes execute korar order দেওয়া। সুবিধা: CPU utilization বাড়ে, response time কমে, এবং fairness থাকে

TCP (Transmission Control Protocol): Reliable because it provides connection-oriented communication, error checking, acknowledgements, and retransmission of lost packets. UDP (User Datagram Protocol): Unreliable, connectionless, no guarantee of delivery
DNS (Domain Name System) translates human-readable domain names (like www.example.com⁠�) into IP addresses. Without DNS, users would need to remember IP addresses.
TCP: reliable, connection-oriented, lost packets retransmit kore UDP: fast, connectionless, delivery guaranteed nai
IP address: logical address, network level identify kore MAC address: physical address, hardware level identify kore

Overfitting: When a model learns training data too well, including noise, so it performs poorly on new data. Prevention techniques: Use more training data Apply regularization (L1/L2) Use cross-validation Prune or simplify the model
Supervised learning: Model learns from labeled data (input → output). Unsupervised learning: Model finds patterns in unlabeled data (e.g., clustering, dimensionality reduction).
Overfitting hoy jokhon model training data over-learn kore, test data te fail kore Prevention: more data, regularization, cross-validation, simple model
Features er scale different thakle model converge korte slow hoy Example: Standardization (mean=0, std=1), Min-Max scaling (0–1)
Dataset হল ML model শেখার জন্য সংগৃহীত তথ্যের collection। Model এর training, testing, এবং evaluation এর জন্য দরকার

SQL Injection: Attackers insert malicious SQL code into input fields to access or manipulate the database. Prevention: Use prepared statements / parameterized queries Validate and sanitize user input Limit database permissions

Symmetric encryption: Same key used for encryption and decryption (fast, less secure if key leaks) Asymmetric encryption: Uses public key for encryption and private key for decryption (secure, slower)
SQL injection = malicious input diye database hack kora Prevention: parameterized query, input validation, proper DB permissions
Phishing = fraudulent emails / websites diye sensitive info collect kora User info leak hoy → account hack, financial loss, identity theft
Firewall হল network security device, যা unauthorized access block করে। Incoming/outgoing traffic monitor এবং control করে

TLE (Time Limit Exceeded) occurs when the algorithm takes too long for large inputs. Optimization techniques: Use efficient data structures (e.g., sets, heaps) Reduce nested loops Use faster algorithms (binary search, DP, greedy) Avoid unnecessary computations

Greedy: Make the best choice at each step without considering future consequences. Works when local optimum = global optimum. Dynamic Programming: Solve problems using overlapping subproblems and optimal substructure, storing results to avoid recomputation.
Avoid nested loops or reduce complexity Use efficient algorithm/data structure Precompute results, use memoization / DP Fast I/O (C++: ios::sync_with_stdio(false);)
Stack: LIFO (Last In First Out) Queue: FIFO (First In First Out) Problem choose korar jonno data access order important
Constraints বলে দেয় input size, time limits, jate programmer efficient algorithm choose korte pare Ignore korle TLE ba memory limit exceed hote pare

Break the project into independent modules based on functionality. Define inputs, outputs, and responsibilities for each module. Ensure modules are loosely coupled and easily testable. Example: For a To-Do app → Authentication, Task Management, Notifications, Database modules.

Consider project requirements, team skills, and scalability. Frontend: React, Angular, Vue Backend: Node.js, Django, Spring Boot Database: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB Use tools/frameworks that speed up development and maintenance.
